sections.name: Subjective
sections.asr_prompt: Subjective. Chief complaint, onset, duration, course. Associated symptoms: fever, pain, cough, fatigue. Chronic conditions, current medications, allergies. Social history, family history.
sections.synthesis_prompt: Write the Subjective section in the third person, concise clinical English. Preserve symptom duration, current medications, and allergies. Do not invent facts not in the dictation.

sections.name: Objective
sections.asr_prompt: Objective. General appearance, mental status. Temperature, heart rate, blood pressure, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation. Skin, mucosa, lymph nodes. Heart and lung auscultation. Abdomen. Edema.
sections.synthesis_prompt: Write the Objective section. Lead with vital signs, then findings by organ system. Include only dictated findings.

sections.name: Assessment
sections.asr_prompt: Assessment. Primary diagnosis, complications, comorbidities. ICD-10 code. Differential diagnosis if relevant.
sections.synthesis_prompt: State the assessment: primary diagnosis, complications, comorbidities. Add the ICD-10 code only if explicitly dictated.

sections.name: Plan
sections.asr_prompt: Plan. Medications: drug, dose, frequency, duration. Non-pharmacological advice. Referrals and investigations. Follow-up date. Sick note if needed.
sections.synthesis_prompt: Write the Plan as a numbered list of orders. For each medication preserve dose, frequency, and duration verbatim. Separate referrals and the follow-up date.
